name: Tomato-Curry Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
3. Dredge the chicken pieces in the seasoned flour mixture.
4. Melt butter in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add chicken and brown on all sides for 2-3 minutes.
6. Turn the chicken over and cook until lightly browned for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Transfer the chicken to a 9 x 13-inch casserole dish.
8. Add onions, peppers, curry powder, garlic, and thyme to the skillet.
9. Cook on medium heat, stirring occasionally, until onions are soft and golden, about 9 minutes.
10. Add tomatoes and increase heat to high.
11. Bring to a boil and scrape the pan to deglaze it.
12. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
13. Bake uncovered until the chicken is cooked through, approximately 30 minutes.
